text: I usually wake up at 6:30 a.m. and start my day with a glass of water and a short stretch. After a quick shower, I have breakfast while checking my emails. My work schedule is quite consistent: I start at 9 a.m. and finish at 5 p.m., with a lunch break around noon. In the evening, I always make time for exercise—either a 30-minute jog or some yoga at home. After dinner, I like to read a book or watch a series before going to bed at around 10:30 p.m. This routine helps me stay organized and feel balanced throughout the week.
